testcases.input: s = "level" Output: "l" Explanation: s contains 4 prefix excluding itself ("l", "le", "lev", "leve"), and suffix ("l", "el", "vel", "evel"). The largest prefix which is also suffix is given by "l".
testcases.expectedOutput: "l" Explanation: s contains 4 prefix excluding itself ("l", "le", "lev", "leve"), and suffix ("l", "el", "vel", "evel"). The largest prefix which is also suffix is given by "l".

testcases.input: s = "ababab" Output: "abab" Explanation: "abab" is the largest prefix which is also suffix. They can overlap in the original string.
testcases.expectedOutput: "abab" Explanation: "abab" is the largest prefix which is also suffix. They can overlap in the original string.
